typography.font_setup: Import via Google Fonts. Manrope for titles/large financial numbers. Inter for body text/labels/forms/tables.

layout.architecture: desktop-first, left fixed sidebar, top sticky header
layout.sidebar: w-64 fixed inset-y-0 left-0 bg-[#F2F4F6] flex flex-col justify-between
layout.header: sticky top-0 z-40 h-16 bg-[#F7F9FB] flex items-center justify-between px-6
layout.spacing: Spacious padding, generous gaps between sections to communicate high-end trust.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0037B0] to-[#1D4ED8] text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity border-none cursor-pointer
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#0037B0] border border-[#0037B0] rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium hover:bg-[#F2F4F6] transition-colors cursor-pointer

tables.header: bg-[#F7F9FB] text-[#434655] border-b border-[#C4C5D7] sticky top-0 font-medium
tables.rules: No vertical table dividers. Clean header, right aligned amounts, zebra striping, compact but readable.

inputs.default: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#C4C5D7] rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm text-[#191C1E] placeholder:text-[#434655]/60 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0037B0]

non_negotiable_rules: No pure black #000000. Darkest text must be #191C1E.
No random gradients except the main CTA buttons (#0037B0 to #1D4ED8).
No strong hard borders for section separation. Use surface changes (e.g. #F2F4F6 to #FFFFFF).
No flashy shadows. Rely on flat tonal layers and 1px borders if necessary.
No inconsistent border radius (cards 12-16px, buttons medium rounded, pills fully rounded).
Main app background must be #F7F9FB, Sidebar/grouped sections must be #F2F4F6, Cards/forms/tables must be white.
Include subtle badge 'Hishab Nikash Pro — Powered by iAlam'.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.

image_urls.description: Clean, architectural glass building suitable for professional enterprise software login screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a precise, high-end corporate accounting system. Do NOT treat this as a startup landing page.
Use Javascript (.js/.jsx) for all components and pages, NOT TypeScript (.ts/.tsx).
Configure Tailwind config exactly with the provided hex colors under 'theme.colors'. Disable pure black entirely.
Install Google Fonts 'Manrope' (headings, numbers) and 'Inter' (body, UI).
If using Shadcn components, you MUST aggressively override their default styles to match the border rules (no hard borders, rely on surface changes) and card rules (12-16px radius, no heavy shadows).
Ensure the layout strictly follows: Fixed left sidebar (#F2F4F6), sticky top header (#F7F9FB), main content area (#F7F9FB), and white cards (#FFFFFF).
Implement numeric columns in tables with 'text-right tabular-nums font-heading' to ensure decimal alignment for currency.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms.
Build out the multi-company switcher in the header or top of sidebar.
For Phase 1 pages (Dashboard, Sales List, Create Invoice, etc.), ensure high consistency. Never invent new color palettes.
